prompt_scope_summary: Implement required fixes from FAIL findings for work item wi-001 in a single bounded patch.
prompt_text:
Motivation
- Repair FAIL review findings for work item wi-001 using a single bounded implementation pass.

Scope
- Apply required fixes and include only critical context that materially explains those fixes.

Required fixes
1. [required_fixes-1] Add explicit caller-boundary guard in `spectrum_systems/modules/runtime/enforcement_engine.py`.

Likely files involved
- `spectrum_systems/modules/runtime/enforcement_engine.py`
- `tests/test_enforcement_engine.py`

Tests to run
- pytest -q tests/test_enforcement_engine.py

Implementation constraints
- Keep changes deterministic and scoped to listed required fixes.
- Do not claim full closure of optional improvements in this patch.

Not in scope
- `optional_improvements-1`: Plan migration to retire legacy compatibility paths in a follow-up prompt.

Mandatory delivery contract
- Return intent, architecture, guarantees, tests mapped to guarantees, and remaining gaps.
bounded_not_in_scope: optional_improvements-1: Plan migration to retire legacy compatibility paths in a follow-up prompt.
